raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "frontally",
    "Precondition": "The right arm has unobstructed frontal access to box_2 and the tabletop area to the right of box_2 is clear. The cup is positioned in front of box_2 but does not obstruct a small right-ward slide of the box.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is shifted a few centimeters to the right, creating a clear gap between box_1 and box_2 wide enough for the left arm to approach the right face of box_1 without collision."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "A gap exists on both the left and right sides of box_1. Both arms can approach from the front, align laterally with the side faces of the 30 cm box, and the space above the box is clear for lifting.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is securely held between the two end-effectors, lifted off the tabletop, and under full control of the robot."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The right arm has unobstructed frontal access to box_2 and the tabletop area to the right of box_2 is clear. The cup is positioned in front of box_2 but does not obstruct a small right-ward slide of the box.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is shifted a few centimeters to the right, creating a clear gap between box_1 and box_2 wide enough for the left arm to approach the right face of box_1 without collision.

parsed_json.Precondition: A gap exists on both the left and right sides of box_1. Both arms can approach from the front, align laterally with the side faces of the 30 cm box, and the space above the box is clear for lifting.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is securely held between the two end-effectors, lifted off the tabletop, and under full control of the robot.
